users.title: User Profile
users.description: Contains public identity and metadata for users

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was generated

conversations.title: User Conversations
conversations.description: Contains chat history conversations and list of messages for a user

personalityId.description: The active assistant personality ID used

messages.description: Nested list of messages, each having id, role, text, timestamp

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was last updated

users/{userId}.description: Individual user document mapped to their Auth UID

users/{userId}/conversations/{conversati.description: Conversation document containing individual chat histories for the user
